response.original_title: Time Detective Show. Episode 1: Girls Against Death
response.overview: A grandchild turns into a time traveller, fights to edit their grandmother out of a tragic plot, one frame of wartime film at a time. All reported back in the form of a "Time Detective Show.” The first episode: “Girls Against Death” takes you on a bizarre exploration of how temporality is displaced by historical and intergenerational grievance.
response.title: Time Detective Show. Episode 1: Girls Against Death
